# M.O.B.I.™ · SPEC or DOCS change request v1.0.2

## Context & Goal
*Provide a clear, high-level summary of the requirement or the problem this SPEC aims to solve.*

## Implementation Plan
- [ ] This issue is the trigger for a **New SPEC**.
- [ ] Target Directory: `docs/specs/`

## Acceptance Criteria (Definition of Done)

- [ ] The document is merged into the `main` branch under the `docs/specs/` folder.
